plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-097 RP01.P02.M06.S07-RP01.P04.M02.S03 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-097 core domain API golden evidence pack

notes: CP00-097 closes a generated Risk C 150-unit pack without splitting into one-unit subphase closeouts.
Implementation remains synthetic-only and does not evaluate runtime permission, write audit ledger entries, create database rows, mutate product state, or implement LDIP.
The pack covers synthetic API contract, golden cases, Hermes evidence packet, Claude review packet, closeout handoff, and initial UI surface inventory.
